Home.metaDescription: Handcrafted timepieces designed to stay by your side and witness life's meaningful moments.
Home.ogTitle: HUMPBUCK Watches - Meaningful Gifts of Time and Love
Home.ogDescription: Handcrafted timepieces designed to stay by your side and witness life's meaningful moments.
Home.mechanicalHeroLead: Handcrafted timepieces designed to stay by your side and witness life's meaningful moments.
Home.mechanicalHeroImageAlt: HUMPBUCK homepage hero — handcrafted premium timepieces
Home.momentsLead: Some moments change everything. Our timepieces are here for all of them.
Home.momentsCard1Description: For the decisions, celebrations, and nights worth remembering.
Home.momentsCard2Description: For the journeys, rituals, and little things that stay with you.
Home.categoryMechanicalLead: Automatic movements, open-worked dials, and finishing built for collectors.
Home.categoryMechanicalImageAlt: Skeleton mechanical watch movement with visible gears
Home.categoryQuartzLead: Precise quartz calibers, ana-digi layouts, and sport-ready cases for everyday timing.
Home.categoryQuartzImageAlt: HUMPBUCK quartz ana-digi watch on wrist
Home.heroLead1: Ana-digi multifunction watch — dual displays, full feature set.
Home.heroLead2: Time, date, alarm, outdoor temperature, and stopwatch modes in a compact stainless steel case — cockpit-clear readability for daily wear.
Home.heroComingSoonBody: We're syncing catalog data. Please check back shortly.
Home.seriesShopCount: Shop the series · {count, plural, one {# product} other {# products}}
Home.tonneauHeadline: Keep your foot down when life asks you to lift.
Home.tonneauTagline: Racing pulses, flight-deck focus, and materials that earn their place.
Home.tonneauDescription: Some watches remind you of the time. RM-TONNEAU is our reminder that bravery isn’t loud—it’s the decision to move again. The barrel case carries that tension: curved like velocity made solid, open enough to show the work inside. Motorsport, aerospace, and cutting-edge finishing aren’t decoration here; they’re the vocabulary of people who refuse to stall.
Home.rdAstralHeadline: Under the same stars—the courage to keep dreaming.
Home.rdAstralTagline: Inspired by childhood nights under the stars.
Home.rdAstralDescription: RD-ASTRAL draws on the founder as a child—looking up, tracing constellations, trying to glimpse the edge of the cosmos. The watches are our nudge not to let ordinary life wear you down: keep the courage to pursue what you love, and hold onto a sincere passion deep inside. Skeleton architecture and bold dial drama carry that stargazing spirit.
Home.recommendedIntro: Handcrafted timepieces designed to stay by your side and witness life's meaningful moments.
Home.founderStoryImageAlt: Mechanical watch on a wooden post with a child in a rural village in the background
Home.trustGlobalBody: Duty/tax messaging at checkout where applicable.
Home.trustLaunchBody: Factory programs for growing watch brands.
Home.certaintySupportPrompt: Have a question that is not covered here? No problem.
Home.certaintyCurrencyTitle: What currency are prices shown in?
Home.certaintyCurrencyBody: All prices are listed in US dollars. Use the currency control at the bottom-left of your screen for a live reference conversion. Your card or wallet is charged in USD at checkout.
Home.certaintyShippingTitle: Do you ship to my country?
Home.certaintyShippingBody:
Yes — we ship worldwide. Orders are processed within three business days. Tracked delivery typically arrives in 7–21 days, depending on your region. Shipping fees (if any) are calculated and shown at checkout before you pay; many destinations qualify for free standard shipping.


• North America & Caribbean — Canada, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, Puerto Rico, Trinidad and Tobago, United States

• South America — Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Paraguay, Peru, Uruguay

• Europe — Albania, Austria, Belgium, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Moldova, Montenegro, Netherlands, North Macedonia, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Russia, Serbia, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Ukraine, United Kingdom

• Middle East — Bahrain, Iraq, Israel, Jordan, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates

• Asia — Hong Kong, India, Japan, Kazakhstan, Malaysia, Mongolia, Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, Sri Lanka, Thailand, Vietnam

• Africa — Angola, Ghana, Kenya, Morocco, Nigeria, Réunion, Rwanda, South Africa, Tanzania, Uganda

• Oceania — Australia, New Zealand

If your country is not listed above, express options (DHL, FedEx, UPS, or USPS) may still be available at checkout. Some regions require extra customs information (for example, tax ID or KYC documents for India) — we will guide you if needed.
Home.certaintyPaymentsTitle: Which payment methods do you accept?
Home.certaintyPaymentsBody: Pay with PayPal, major credit and debit cards, Apple Pay, or Google Pay — processed through trusted payment partners with encrypted checkout.
Home.certaintyOrderBody:
After your payment is completed, you will see a successful payment confirmation and receive a confirmation email with your order number, product details, shipping address, and customer service contact information.

Your order will usually be shipped within 1–2 business days. Once it has been shipped, you will receive another email with your tracking number and tracking website, so you can follow your package every step of the way with peace of mind.
Home.newsletterBody: Handcrafted timepieces designed to stay by your side and witness life's meaningful moments.
Home.couponQuestion: What's the most precious thing in life?
Home.couponNoCodeMessage: Your coupon will appear here once a homepage coupon is configured in admin.

PolicyContact.title: Contact us
PolicyContact.introDefault: For any questions regarding shipping rates, delivery times, or technical support, please reach out to our team:
PolicyContact.introPrivacy: For privacy-related requests or questions about this Privacy Policy:
PolicyContact.introRefund: For returns, refunds, or policy questions, reach out to our team:

PolicyPages.privacyMetaDescription: How HUMPBUCK collects, uses, and discloses personal information.
PolicyPages.termsMetaDescription: Terms and conditions for using HUMPBUCK and our Services.
PolicyPages.refundMetaDescription: Returns, exchanges, refunds, and exceptions — HUMPBUCK.
PolicyPages.shippingMetaDescription: Shipping policy, processing times, tracking, customs, taxes, and contact — HUMPBUCK.

RefundPolicy.title: Refund policy
RefundPolicy.introStrong: We have a 30-day return policy, which means you have 30 days after receiving your item to request a return.
RefundPolicy.introEligibility: To be eligible for a return, your item must be in the same condition that you received it, unworn or unused, with tags, and in its original packaging. You'll also need the receipt or proof of purchase.
RefundPolicy.returnStartA: To start a return, you can contact us at
RefundPolicy.returnStartC: . Please note that returns will need to be sent to the following address:
RefundPolicy.returnAfterAccept: If your return is accepted, we'll send you a return shipping label, as well as instructions on how and where to send your package. Items sent back to us without first requesting a return will not be accepted.
RefundPolicy.damagesBody: Please inspect your order upon reception and contact us immediately if the item is defective, damaged, or if you receive the wrong item, so that we can evaluate the issue and make it right.
RefundPolicy.exceptionsP1: Certain types of items cannot be returned, like perishable goods (such as food, flowers, or plants), custom products (such as special orders or personalized items), and personal care goods (such as beauty products). We also do not accept returns for hazardous materials, flammable liquids, or gases. Please get in touch via email or WhatsApp if you have questions or concerns about your specific item.
RefundPolicy.exceptionsP2: Unfortunately, we cannot accept returns on sale items or gift cards.
RefundPolicy.exchangesBody: The fastest way to ensure you get what you want is to return the item you have, and once the return is accepted, make a separate purchase for the new item.
RefundPolicy.eu14Body: Notwithstanding the above, if the merchandise is being shipped into the European Union, you have the right to cancel or return your order within 14 days, for any reason and without a justification. As above, your item must be in the same condition that you received it, unworn or unused, with tags, and in its original packaging. You'll also need the receipt or proof of purchase.
RefundPolicy.refundsP1: We will notify you once we've received and inspected your return, and let you know if the refund was approved or not. If approved, you'll be automatically refunded on your original payment method within 10 business days. Please remember it can take some time for your bank or credit card company to process and post the refund too.
RefundPolicy.refundsP2: If more than 15 business days have passed since we've approved your return, please contact us.

Account.overviewIntro: Hello, {greeting}. Manage your orders, addresses, and profile from here.
Account.ordersCardCount: {count, plural, one {# order on file} other {# orders on file}}
Account.ordersPageIntro: Orders placed while signed in are linked to your account.
Account.ordersEmpty: You do not have any orders yet.

Account.detailShippingLocked: Shipping address can be changed only before a tracking number is added, and while the order is paid or processing.
Account.settingsIntro: Update how we address you and manage your password.
Account.profileEmailReadonlyHint: Email changes require support for now.
Account.profilePasswordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
Account.avatarIntro: If you do not use a custom photo, we show your Gravatar for this email (header and reviews). Choose one of 30 built-in avatars (hosted on our CDN) or upload your own. Uploads are compressed to WebP in your browser, then stored in R2 under Avatar/.
Account.avatarErrTooLarge: Photo is still too large after compression.
Account.addressesPageIntro: Used for invoices and delivery. You can update these any time.
Account.editShipIntro: Order {orderId}. Updates apply to this order only. The shop is notified by email after you save.
Account.editShipErrIncomplete: Please complete all required address fields.
Account.editShipOkUnchanged: No changes detected — your shipping address was already saved. No emails were sent.
Account.editShipOkBothNotified: Shipping address updated. We've emailed you a confirmation and notified the shop.
Account.editShipOkBuyerOnly: Shipping address updated. We emailed you a confirmation; the shop notification could not be sent.
Account.editShipOkMerchantOnly: Shipping address updated. The shop was notified; we could not send a confirmation to your email.
Account.editShipOkNeither: Shipping address updated. Email notifications could not be sent — we still saved your address.
Account.editShipCannotEdit: This order can no longer be edited here (for example, it may not be paid yet, or a tracking number has already been added).

AccountCancel.confirmBody: Order #{orderNum} will be marked as cancelled. You can no longer edit the shipping address for this order.
AccountCancel.refundsNotice: Refunds are reviewed by our team first, usually within 1–2 business days. Once approved, your payment will be refunded to your original payment method — thank you for your patience. If you need urgent help, use the options below.
AccountCancel.noPaymentCaptured: No payment has been captured for this order yet. Cancelling will simply void it — no refund is needed.
AccountCancel.successBody: Your order was cancelled successfully. We've sent a confirmation email to you and the shop.
AccountCancel.successUnpaid: This order was unpaid — nothing was charged, so no refund applies.
AccountCancel.shippedBody: This order has shipped and can't be cancelled from your account.
AccountCancel.shippedHelp: If you need help with shipment or delivery, reach us using the options below.
AccountCancel.errCannotOnline: This order cannot be cancelled online.
AccountCancel.errNeedHelp: Need help? Reach us using the options below.

AccountReview.photosHint: Photos are resized, compressed, and saved as WebP in your browser before upload. Up to 4 images · about 0.6–1.5 MB typical each (under 2 MB cap).

AccountReview.appendIntro: Add a follow-up to your verified review.
AccountReview.appendPlaceholder: Additional thoughts after more use, shipping, support…
AccountReview.appendPhotosHint: Optional photos are resized, compressed, and saved as WebP before upload. Up to 4 images, under 2 MB each (typical 0.6–1.5 MB).

BlogPage.empty: New posts are on the way. Check back soon.

OemOdmPage.metaDescription: Veteran watch manufacturer with over two decades of expertise. OEM and ODM services for global brands — 200,000+ premium watches annually.
OemOdmPage.introLine1: We are a veteran watch manufacturer with over two decades of dedicated expertise,
OemOdmPage.introLine2: trusted by global brands to produce over 200,000 premium watches annually. We offer OEM/ODM.
OemOdmPage.odmText: Apply your logo to our watch models (dial, crown, case back). The quality is stable, no need to remold, and the cost is relatively low.
OemOdmPage.odmSummaryLine: Reference unit price: Inquiry · MOQ 500 · Lead time 1–2 months
OemOdmPage.oemText: We can make the mold based on the watch sample you provided, but the cost would be really high. We don't recommend it for our first time working together.
OemOdmPage.oemPartnershipNote: For first-time partnerships, we recommend ODM; discuss OEM once the relationship is established.
OemOdmPage.moqOdmWhy: Low starting risk, faster lead times, proven quality.
OemOdmPage.moqOemWhy: Fully bespoke design with proprietary molds.
OemOdmPage.samplePolicyShowroomText: We have a product sample showroom, and we usually have extra samples available that we can provide. However, if the samples are in short supply, we won't be able to offer them — please understand. You can judge the product quality by looking at the pictures or videos.
OemOdmPage.samplePolicyCostText: Samples are paid prototypes, and all shipping costs are the responsibility of the buyer. Please contact our team for a custom sample quote.
OemOdmPage.customizationStep1Text: Select your watch design and confirm the unit pricing.
OemOdmPage.customizationStep2Text: Provide us with your logo. We'll create mockups of the watch for you, and there will be several rounds of communication and confirmation during this process. Please note that physical samples with your logo are not included in this process, as custom mold-making for a single watch is prohibitively expensive.
OemOdmPage.customizationStep3Text: After confirming the final production plan, we'll send you an invoice, and you'll need to pay 30% of the total cost as a deposit.
OemOdmPage.customizationStep4Text: We make watches, and the production cycle usually takes 1–2 months. We'll adjust accordingly if there are holidays involved.
OemOdmPage.customizationStep5Text: Every watch undergoes strict QC. Once passed and packed, we arrange shipment to your designated location. Before shipping, you need to pay the remaining balance.
OemOdmPage.paymentIntro: We operate on a standard 30/70 payment structure:
OemOdmPage.paymentDepositText: Required upon signing the Proforma Invoice (PI) to initiate production.
OemOdmPage.paymentBalanceText: Required after production is completed and the goods pass our quality inspection, prior to dispatch.
OemOdmPage.paymentMethodsText: We support Bank Wire Transfer (T/T), Alipay, and other secure payment methods.
OemOdmPage.logisticsIntro: We offer flexible shipping solutions to suit your needs:
OemOdmPage.logisticsAgentText: If you have a shipping agent in China, we can deliver the goods directly to their warehouse.
OemOdmPage.logisticsGlobalText: If you need direct export to your country, you can specify your carrier, or we can recommend a trusted logistics partner offering DDP (Delivered Duty Paid — Double Clearance) services. Note: All shipping costs are borne by the buyer.
OemOdmPage.featuredModelsIntro: Start with proven HUMPBUCK designs — apply your logo on dial, crown, or case back.
OemOdmPage.featuredModelsMoreCta: More watch models? Select from the full catalog in the submission form below ↓
OemOdmPage.getStartedIntro: Select a model, tell us where to place your logo, and upload your artwork. We'll prepare a digital mockup and email it to you.
OemOdmPage.inquiryLogoHint: JPG or PNG format. Transparent PNG recommended.
OemOdmPage.inquiryNotesPlaceholder: Quantity estimate, color preferences, or other details (optional)
OemOdmPage.inquiryErrLogoRequired: Please upload your logo (JPG or PNG).
OemOdmPage.inquiryErrUpload: Logo upload failed. Please try again.
OemOdmPage.inquiryErrSubmit: Failed to send. Please try again.
OemOdmPage.inquirySuccessBody: Thank you for your trust. We received your request and will prepare a digital mockup (not a physical sample) as soon as possible, sent to your email. For urgent requests, contact us on WhatsApp.

AboutPage.metaDescription: Handcrafted timepieces designed to stay by your side and witness life's meaningful moments.
AboutPage.storyP1: Growing up, I watched my father—a master watch repairman—breathe life into countless timepieces after school. As he stayed by my side through my milestones, those watches marked every beat of my journey. That is where our bond was born. Time and companionship are life's most precious gifts. Now, I hope my handcrafted HUMPBUCK watches will stay by your side and bear witness to your most meaningful moments.
AboutPage.contactLead: Product questions or order help — email us or message on WhatsApp.
AboutPage.mapFallback: Regional map preview. Use Open in Google Maps for directions and satellite view.
AboutPage.contactTrustNote: We reply within 1–2 business days. For urgent order help, WhatsApp is fastest.
